title: Draft TaskBoard Governance V1
description: Turn the current lane ownership and dirty-tree pain into a formal TaskBoard governance contract. Cover ownership_scope, allowed_paths, owner_agent, completion_contract, and rollout rules for MCC/localguys.

title: Add minimal governance fields to TaskBoard
description: Extend TaskBoard model, adapters, and API with the four required governance fields: ownership_scope, allowed_paths, owner_agent, completion_contract. Keep them serializable and backward compatible.

title: Enforce TaskBoard owner and completion contract gates
description: Prevent arbitrary agent status mutation and block done transitions unless result_summary, completed_at, and completion_contract are satisfied. Allow verification_agent override by contract.

title: Add extended TaskBoard governance fields
description: Add blocked_paths, forbidden_scopes, verification_agent, worktree_hint, touch_policy, overlap_risk, and depends_on_docs. Define normalization rules and a compact policy matrix for lane isolation.

title: Feed TaskBoard governance metadata into MCC task packets
description: Extend the canonical MCC task packet so agents receive governance metadata from the DAG-linked packet: ownership_scope, allowed_paths, blocked_paths, owner_agent, verification_agent, touch_policy, overlap_risk, and completion_contract.
